send-basic.description: Single transactional send using an HTML file and idempotency.

batch-send.description: Batch send from a JSON file.

domain-sending-receiving.description: Create a sending + receiving domain in EU region.

webhook-dev-listen.description: Local webhook loop using a tunnel and forward-to.

broadcast-draft.description: Create a draft broadcast backed by an HTML file.

template-create.description: Create a hosted template draft and then publish it.
template-create.command: resend --json -q templates create --name "Welcome" --html-file ./template.html --subject "Welcome" --var NAME:string && resend --json -q templates publish <template-id>

api-key-domain-scope.description: Create a sending-only API key scoped to one domain.

github-actions-email.description: GitHub Actions job that sends a notification using RESEND_API_KEY.
